<!--
HandsOff default PR template.
The "Closes #" line below is what the project board automation looks for:
it auto-links this PR to its issue and moves the card (In Review on open,
Merged on merge). KEEP IT and fill in the issue number. Examples:
  Closes #123          this PR completes issue #123
  Fixes #123           bug fix
  Closes #12, closes #34   multiple issues
If this PR genuinely has no issue (rare chore/meta), delete the line and write:
  No issue: <one-line reason>
-->
Closes #

## What changed


## Scope boundary
- [ ] Does not add a new product surface
- [ ] Does not add a new command class
- [ ] Does not add a new target-app promise
- [ ] Does not bypass approval / safety gates

## How tested
- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test
- [ ] Demo trace attached

## Evidence
<!-- screenshots / video / logs if this changes UX, input, CUA, or agent behavior -->

## Risk
<!-- what can break? -->

## Rollback
<!-- flag/branch to disable this -->
